basis: Barclays sent final bid process letters on June 24, 2016 requesting marked drafts of merger agreement by July 7 and setting final bid deadline of July 8. This round announcement triggered formal submissions (imp_e28, imp_e29).
source_text: Later on June 24, 2016, Barclays sent final bid process letters to Sponsor B and Thoma Bravo, requesting marked drafts of the Company's proposed form of merger agreement (which would be provided in due course) by July 7, 2016, and setting a final bid deadline of July 8, 2016.
alternative_basis: Thoma Bravo's June 9 indication included a draft merger agreement (Rule 2 formal); could mark first formal proposal in the chronology.

basis: Thoma Bravo sent an unsolicited indication of interest on March 9, 2016. The Board's May 5 decision to explore a strategic process explicitly cited the indication of interest received from Thoma Bravo as a factor.
source_text: On March 9, 2016, Thoma Bravo sent an unsolicited, non-binding indication of interest letter addressed to the Board indicating that Thoma Bravo would be interested in acquiring the Company for cash at a purchase price of $15.00 per share of Imprivata's common stock.
